title: Amethyst Anchors
description: This texture pack has low fire, no explosion effect, based on amethyst and will help your gameplay while playing crystal pvp
body: Amethyst Anchors is a Crystal PvP resource pack built for clean visuals and better performance. Featuring stylish purple low fire, custom purple respawn anchors, and enhanced crystal textures, this pack makes fights clearer and smoother. Designed to improve visibility and reduce distractions, Amethyst Anchors gives you the edge you need in fast-paced Crystal PvP battles.
